---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that isn't currently possible or convenient?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or API you'd like.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've tried.

## Additional context

Links, mockups, or references to how the original emoji-mart handles this, if relevant.
